title: Matsue, Shimane — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Matsue, Shimane: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Matsue is a city in Shimane with a population of 205,000. A historic castle city on Lake Shinji, known for its beautiful sunset views, green tea, and traditional culture.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
